_comment: SALLA THEME SETTINGS — This file defines the default values for all theme settings declared in twilight.json. When migrating to a real Salla theme, these values are placed in config/settings_data.json.

hero.hero_subtext: Premium accessories inspired by iconic pop culture. Elevated design meets the fandoms you love.

brand_banner.quote: We believe fandom shouldn't mean compromising on aesthetics. LORE was born to bridge the gap between pop culture and premium design.

collections.subtext: Find the aesthetic that matches your favorite genre.
